studyName: RNAseq Transcriptomic Analyses of European Ancestry Samples in MGS Dataset

variables.name: EA_PC_1
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 1 of 5; North-South)

variables.name: EA_PC_2
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 2 of 5; slight North-South)

variables.name: EA_PC_3
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 3 of 5; East-West)

variables.name: EA_PC_4
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 4 of 5; none)

variables.name: EA_PC_5
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 5 of 5; Ashkenazi)

variables.name: EBV_LOAD
variables.description: EBV load (viral load) of LCL

variables.name: EBV_TRANSFORMATION_SITE
variables.description: Site of EBV transformation to produce LCL

variables.name: RNAseq_PMID_26022996
variables.description: Analyzed subject in PMID: 26022996 (outliers manuscript)

variables.name: RNAseq_PMID_28418402
variables.description: Analyzed subject in PMID: 28418402 (baseline manuscript)

variables.name: RNAseq_PMID_30115913
variables.description: Analyzed subject in PMID: 30115913 (dopamine manuscript)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: age
variables.description: Subject age

variables.name: race
variables.description: Race of participant

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type -- all samples are RNA

variables.name: ATP_PER_CELL_COUNT_BASELINE
variables.description: ATP level adjusted by number of cells reflecting energy status of LCLs for baseline (unstimulated) sample -- positive number with values from ATP average of duplicate luminescence readings from ATP assay, corrected for concentration of cells by dividing by cell count (see PMID's 26022996, 28418402, and 3011591 for further details) for baseline (unstimulated) sample; if a dopamine stimulated sample then denoted as N/A

variables.name: ATP_PER_CELL_COUNT_DOPAMINE
variables.description: ATP level adjusted by number of cells reflecting energy status of LCLs for dopamine stimulated sample -- positive number with values from ATP average of duplicate luminescence readings from ATP assay, corrected for concentration of cells by dividing by cell count (see PMID's 26022996, 28418402, and 3011591 for further details) for dopamine stimulated sample; if a baseline (unstimulated) sample then denoted as N/A

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected -- all are LCLs made from peripheral blood

variables.name: CELL_COUNT_BASELINE
variables.description: LCL cell count at harvest reflecting growth rate for baseline (unstimulated) sample -- positive number with values from viable cell count at harvest x10^6 (24 hrs after 0.250 x 10^6 cells/ml) (see PMID's 26022996, 28418402, and 3011591 for further details) for baseline (unstimulated) sample; if a dopamine stimulated sample then denoted as N/A

variables.name: CELL_COUNT_DOPAMINE
variables.description: LCL cell count at harvest reflecting growth rate for dopamine stimulated sample -- positive number with values from viable cell count at harvest x10^6 (24 hrs after 0.250 x 10^6 cells/ml) (see PMID's 26022996, 28418402, and 3011591 for further details) for dopamine stimulated sample; if a baseline (unstimulated) sample then denoted as N/A

variables.name: EXPRESSION_RNAseq_BATCH
variables.description: RNAseq batch (1-5) in which sample was RNAsequenced

variables.name: EXPRESSION_SERVICE
variables.description: Name of the service provider which ran the RNAseq -- UMGC = University of Minnesota Genomics Center (formerly BMGC = Biomedical Genomics Center)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample -- all RNA samples from LCLs

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID -- sample ID incorporates RUCDR ID (SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID), and also wave-tech-sample -- namely growing wave number or letters (with the "w"

variables.name: STIMULATION_STATUS
variables.description: Indication whether LCL was baseline (unstimulated) or dopamine-stimulated

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Schizophrenia case control status of subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository -- also known as DNA_ID, the ID number assigned by the RUCDR to this subject's DNA specimens and LCLs (lymphoblastoid cell lines)

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID2
variables.description: Submitted_subject_ID for GAIN2 (dbGaP study ID phs000021) vs. NIMH_nonGAIN_Schizophrenia (dbGaP study ID phs000167)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID -- Also known as the GAIN/nonGAIN ID, this is the 5 digit ID you will find in GAIN and nonGAIN data (i.e., GWAS data deposited into dbGaP). GAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000021; nonGAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000167.

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate -- all from RUCDR (Rutgers University Cell and DNA Repository)

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE2
variables.description: Name of dbGaP GWAS for subject -- GAIN2 = GAIN = dbGaP study ID phs000021 -- NIMH_nonGAIN_Schizophrenia = nonGAIN = dbGaP study ID phs000167

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID -- sample ID incorporates RUCDR ID (SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID), and also wave-tech-sample -- namely growing wave number or letters (with the "w"

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID -- Also known as the GAIN/nonGAIN ID, this is the 5 digit ID you will find in GAIN and nonGAIN data (i.e., GWAS data deposited into dbGaP). GAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000021; nonGAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000167.
